accurate.why: All claims match: who is sanctioned, conduct, sanctions, exceptions, waiver/termination.

no_hallucinations.why: IEEPA naming and details are accurate context.

states_purpose.why: Clearly states purpose to mandate sanctions on CCP members and related parties.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Bill creates new sanctions authority rather than amending existing law.

exceptions_conditions.why: Covers UN Headquarters, intel/LE/national security, and goods-importation exceptions.

effective_dates.why: Notes 30-day deadline, 60-day waivers, 2-year sunset of waiver authority.

major_provisions_covered.why: Comprehensive coverage of all operative provisions.

correct_entities.why: IEEPA, committees, Central Committee all correct.

judged_via: claude-opus-4-8 via parallel Claude Code subagents (full bill text, web/knowledge-verified)
